name: Vestige Bridge
description: Bridge recent cognitive memory from a Vestige sidecar into OpenClaw runtime hooks.

enabledAgents.description: Only these agent ids use Vestige recall. Empty or omitted means all agents.

baseUrl.description: Base URL for the Vestige MCP HTTP transport.

authTokenPath.description: Path to the Vestige MCP auth token file when VESTIGE_AUTH_TOKEN is not set.

timeoutMs.description: HTTP timeout for sidecar requests in milliseconds.

recallMode.description: Recall runtime mode. provider = expose structured recent recall candidates to orchestrator without prompt injection (default). injector = register before_prompt_build and inject prependContext directly for standalone compatibility/debugging.

freshnessHints.description: Attach age-based verification hints to time-sensitive recalled memories.

freshnessDays.description: Minimum age in days before time-sensitive memories receive a verification hint.

maxPendingMessages.description: Maximum pending raw messages to feed into extraction after watermark-based retrieval.

maxPendingCharacters.description: Character budget for pending raw messages before truncation.

gateModel.description: Gate model as provider/model (e.g. openai-codex/gpt-5.4-mini). Returns TRUE/FALSE only.

extractModel.description: Extract model as provider/model (e.g. openai-codex/gpt-5.2-codex). Performs semantic extraction.

maxItems.description: Maximum number of durable memory items the extractor should emit from one extraction pass. Passed into the extraction prompt as a hard instruction.

includeExistingMemorySynopsis.description: Inject a small synopsis of existing related recent memories into extraction so the model can refine/skip instead of restating duplicates.

existingMemoryMaxItems.description: Maximum number of existing-memory synopsis bullets to include during extraction.

existingMemoryMaxChars.description: Character budget for the existing-memory synopsis block injected into extraction.

bucketPriority.description: Priority order used by recent-memory packing.

failSoft.description: Log and continue instead of throwing on sidecar failures.

triggerIngestOnSessionEnd.description: Run vestige extraction evaluation on session:end hooks.

triggerIngestOnCommandNew.description: Run vestige extraction evaluation on command:new hooks, preferring previousSessionEntry.

triggerIngestOnCommandReset.description: Run vestige extraction evaluation on command:reset hooks, preferring previousSessionEntry.

triggerIngestOnCommandCompact.description: Run vestige extraction evaluation on command:compact when LCM state advanced.

triggerIntervalHours.description: Minimum interval in hours for time-based extraction checks.

lcmDbPath.description: Optional override path to the LCM SQLite database.

triggerLedgerPath.description: Optional override path to the local trigger ledger JSON.
